title: Unraveling JEE ADVANCE: A Comprehensive Guide
summary: The Joint Entrance Examination (JEE) Advanced is a rigorous undergraduate-level exam designed by the IITs and CET. It's an essential hurdle for aspirants aiming to secure admission in premier engineering colleges across India.

sections.heading: JEE Advanced Overview: What is it?
sections.body: The JEE Advanced, a pivotal exam for students aiming to study at IITs and CET-affiliated engineering colleges in India. It tests knowledge across subjects including math, physics, chemistry, biology.
key_points: Tested by major Indian technical institutes

sections.heading: JEE Advanced Process: How does it work?
sections.body: Advance level JEE is conducted as two paper-based examinations. The first part, which includes physics and math papers with optional biology questions for candidates appearing after 2015 or below the age of 16.
key_points: Conducted by CBSE in partnership with IITs

sections.heading: JEE Advanced Relevance: Why it matters?
sections.body: The JEE ADVANCED is considered one of the most challenging exams globally, requiring a deep understanding and application of concepts. This exam significantly influences career opportunities in engineering fields.
